serviceNotes.engine oil: N47 2.0L diesel CBS; MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum oil service with approved diesel Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km: diesel air filter with every third engine oil service (3 × 30,000 km CBS ceiling).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km: diesel fuel filter with every third engine oil service per BMW E90 CBS schedule (garage.wiki / SIB B000214 linkage).
serviceNotes.timing chain: N47 timing chain wear documented; monitor noise; no short fixed OEM replacement interval.
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Diesel EGR and intake manifold soot. Cleaning around ~120,000 km can restore response and reduce faults.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — EU maximum oil service 30,000 km / 24 months. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — interior filter per CBS service display (N47 320d rows)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — air filter with each third engine oil change
serviceSources.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — fuel filter with each third engine oil change (supersedes https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2239-2008/service 60,000 km static row)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: No routine interval in owner literature — REC
serviceSources.timing chain: BMW AG no fixed N47 chain replacement km in consumer CBS table — REC high-mileage inspection
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E90 diesel coolant; REC ~120,000 km
serviceSources.EGR / intake clean: Diesel workshop consensus; not an OEM fixed MFR km
